faqs.question: What pantry pests are common in Hackensack, NJ homes?
faqs.answer: Hackensack residents most commonly encounter Indian meal moths, saw-toothed grain beetles, cigarette beetles, flour beetles, and weevils. These pests infest dry goods like cereals, flour, pasta, nuts, dried fruits, and pet food. They can enter homes through contaminated groceries or find their way inside through small cracks and gaps.
